q1.question: What is Project Ledger?
q1.answer: Project Ledger is a SaaS platform for managing projects, tracking budgets and integrating AI assistance. It was designed as a portfolio project with production-grade features.

q2.question: Is it free?
q2.answer: Yes, we offer a permanent Free plan with up to 2 projects and basic features. We also have Basic ($9.99/month) and Premium ($19.99/month) plans with higher limits and advanced features.

q3.question: Do I need a credit card to sign up?
q3.answer: No. You can create your account and use the Free plan without entering payment details. A card is only required if you decide to subscribe to a paid plan.

q4.question: What technologies is it built with?
q4.answer: The frontend uses Next.js 15, React 19, Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui. The backend uses Node.js with Express, Supabase (PostgreSQL) for the database and n8n for AI automation.

q1.question: How do I create a project?
q1.answer: Go to the "Projects" section in the sidebar and click "New project". Fill in the name, description, budget and currency, and your project will be ready.

q2.question: Can I invite other members to my projects?
q2.answer: Yes, from the project detail you can add members by email. Depending on your plan, you can have up to 5 members (Basic) or unlimited (Premium).

q3.question: What types of expenses can I record?
q3.answer: You can record any expense associated with the project: materials, services, fees, etc. Each expense includes a date, amount, category, payment method and optional description.

q4.question: Can I use multiple currencies?
q4.answer: Yes. The Free plan supports up to 3 currencies, while paid plans allow multi-currency without restrictions.

q1.question: How do I change my plan?
q1.answer: Go to "Settings" → "Billing" and select the desired plan. The change is applied immediately and prorated to the current billing cycle.

q2.question: Can I cancel at any time?
q2.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription whenever you want. You will continue to have access to your plan's features until the end of the paid period.

q3.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q3.answer: Currently the payments module is a simulation for the portfolio. In a real production version, Stripe or PayPal would be integrated.

q1.question: Is my data safe?
q1.answer: All data is stored in Supabase with encryption in transit (HTTPS/TLS) and at rest. We do not share your data with third parties.

q2.question: How does authentication work?
q2.answer: We use JWT with access and refresh tokens managed by Supabase Auth. Sessions expire and rotate automatically.

q3.question: Can I delete my account?
q3.answer: Yes. From Settings you can request the deletion of your account and all your associated data permanently.

q1.question: How does the AI assistant work?
q1.answer: The assistant is integrated via n8n and connects to language models like GPT. You can ask it questions about your projects, request financial analysis or check the history.

q2.question: Does the assistant have access to my data?
q2.answer: The assistant only accesses the data of the active project in your session. It never shares information between users.
